prestazioni: MotoLab Motorsports Stage 2+ S58B30T0 ECU flash with custom ethanol (E85) mapping, targeting 650+ WHP on 30psi via upgraded BorgWarner EFR 9280 turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, paired with a CSF Racing S58-specific intercooler and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate for precise boost control

Full 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with carbon-fiber tips, featuring a straight-pipe design post-cat and a custom X-pipe merge for optimized scavenging, reducing backpressure by 42% over stock while retaining S58’s signature inline-six acoustics

Dinan Engineering S58-specific carbon-fiber driveshaft and 3.55:1 M Performance differential with upgraded clutch-type limited-slip mechanism, paired with a Sachs Performance Stage 3 dual-disc clutch and lightweight flywheel for 0-60mph times under 3.0 seconds
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for G80 M3 CS, featuring carbon-fiber fenders with aggressive 30mm flares, a custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a ducktail spoiler with adjustable Gurney flap for downforce tuning

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with S58-specific valving, 2-way adjustable dampers, and 20mm lower ride height, paired with MCS aluminum top mounts and spherical bearing conversion for track precision, finished with H&R 20mm wheel spacers for flush fitment

Full carbon-fiber interior overhaul by VRSF, including Sabelt 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage with integrated fire suppression system, and a MOTEC C127 dash display replacing the stock iDrive screen for real-time telemetry monitoring
